title: taraxacum hygrophilum
intro: Taraxacum hygrophilum, also known as the water meadow dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as supporting liver and kidney function. Taraxacum hygrophilum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and those seeking natural remedies.
